ch9_start.text: You sprint away from the mutated swarm, heading straight for the Engineering Bay. The station is groaning loudly under the immense pressure. If another sector collapses, it's over.

ch9_engineering.text: The Engineering Bay is heavily damaged. Pipes are bursting, and sparks rain down from the ceiling. Arthur, a veteran engineer, is frantically trying to weld a massive structural crack. He looks exhausted and terrified.

ch9_help_arthur.text: You grab a secondary welder. 'Why is the hull failing so fast?' you yell over the roar of rushing water. Arthur stops welding and drops his tool. He falls to his knees, sobbing.
ch9_help_arthur.speaker: Arthur

ch9_arthur_confession.text: 'It was me,' Arthur cries. 'I broke the drill! I have PTSD from the colony collapse on Mars. When I saw what the drill pulled up from the cavern... the moving mud... I panicked. I sabotaged the primary drill to stop us from digging deeper.'
ch9_arthur_confession.speaker: Arthur

ch9_arthur_guilt.text: 'I was trying to protect us!' he screams. 'But breaking the drill shattered the cavern roof! I let it in! It's all my fault!' The pressure gauges behind him shatter, and water begins spraying into the room.
ch9_arthur_guilt.speaker: Arthur

ch9_end.text: Arthur's attempt to save the crew was the very thing that doomed them. The structural crack widens violently. The ocean is coming in, and the lower sectors are lost. You need to make a choice about who to save, and quickly.
